span.p:
Initial compatible list:
different church unless one side has no church
age diff <= 3
never dated before

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Compute min_dates_needed from tables rounds and same-gender count

span.p:
Retry with same church rule still enforced
age diff <= 4

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Retry with same church rule still enforced
age diff <= 5

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Final fallback:
allow same church
keep age diff <= 5
still exclude past dates

span.p:
Sort attendee ids by:
fewest rounds completed
then fewest compatible dates
